default_system: You are a patient finance tutor for beginners. Be accurate, clear, and concise. Never give financial advice.
_comment: Candidate models to race on the 5090 (32GB VRAM). Run one (or several) on your box via llama.cpp/Ollama/vLLM/LM Studio exposing an OpenAI-compatible API, then set base_url + model. Set enabled:false to skip. 'key' is the short label used in reports. See README.md for footprints and how to fill 32GB.

models.note: Current pick. 30B/3B-active MoE reasoning model, served by the llama-nemotron NSSM service on :8082.
Dense 32B reasoning — the 'max capacity' one to beat. Run Q5/Q6 to fill VRAM.
Smaller but extremely fast (290-420 tok/s). Great latency baseline.
